ClientId.description: The ID of the client. NOTE: this should be the PayerClientId (from GET ClientContracts and/or GET ClientCompleteInfo), which is the ID of the client who holds the contract.

ClientContractId.description: The unique ID of the sale of the contract

TerminationCode.description: ex. Illness, Injury, Moving, BreakingContract (Note this can be customized by each studio).

TerminationComments.description: The comments for terminating a contract.
TerminationComments.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.
